summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of RecycleFlow OS industrial recycling control system. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend testing successful with one critical bug fixed during testing. Complete workflow Entry → Unloading → Grinding → Cooking now working correctly.
passed_tests: Authentication system for all 3 user roles (admin, portaria, operador)
Portaria dashboard - truck entry registration working
Admin dashboard - statistics and digestor performance display working
Complete workflow: Entry creation → Unloading → Grinding → Cooking → Digestor back to free
Digestor status changes (livre → triturando → cozinhando → livre)
Time calculations for each processing stage
